N:=64;
X := x^20*y^32

        - x^2*(5985*x^29 + 1995*x^28 - 7630*x^27 + 9786*x^26 + 4808*x^25 - 11388*x^24 + 23229*x^23 - 14353*x^22 + 15528*x^21 + 4296*x^20 + 663*x^19 + 13781*x^18 + 21588*x^17 - 60392*x^16 - 140434*x^15 - 88506*x^14 + 37698*x^13- 22146*x^12 + 15642*x^11 - 15330*x^10 + 12243*x^9 - 10959*x^8 + 7193*x^7 - 5553*x^6 + 2799*x^5 - 2003*x^4 + 649*x^3 - 513*x^2 + 39*x - 91)*y^5
        - x^2*(1330*x^28 + 140*x^27 - 1057*x^26 + 2568*x^25 - 1089*x^24 + 786*x^23 + 1871*x^22 - 1388*x^21 + 3029*x^20 - 430*x^19 + 1300*x^18 + 1680*x^17 + 2528*x^16 - 6272*x^15 - 32679*x^14 - 7004*x^13 - 2684*x^12 + 3776*x^11- 4085*x^10 + 3440*x^9 - 2705*x^8 + 1830*x^7 - 1220*x^6 + 680*x^5 - 395*x^4 + 170*x^3 - 90*x^2 + 24*x - 14)*y^4
        - x^2*(210*x^27 - 42*x^26 - 23*x^25 + 321*x^24 - 291*x^23 + 461*x^22 - 230*x^21 + 282*x^20 + 89*x^19 - 79*x^18 + 564*x^17 - 656*x^16 + 1466*x^15 - 2058*x^14 - 3297*x^13 - 2093*x^12 + 798*x^11 - 634*x^10 + 434*x^9 - 294*x^8 + 189*x^7 - 119*x^6 + 69*x^5 - 39*x^4 + 19*x^3 - 9*x^2 + 3*x - 1)*y^3
        - x^12*(21*x^16 - 12*x^15 + 17*x^14 + 6*x^13 - 8*x^12 + 36*x^11 - 36*x^10 + 60*x^9 - 49*x^8 + 60*x^7 - 29*x^6 + 18*x^5 + 42*x^4 - 84*x^3 - 448*x^2 - 84*x - 6)*y^2
        - x^12*(x^15 - x^14 + 2*x^13 - 2*x^12 + 3*x^11 - 3*x^10 + 4*x^9 - 4*x^8 + 5*x^7 - 5*x^6 + 6*x^5 - 6*x^4 + 7*x^3 - 7*x^2 - 28*x - 4)*y
        + x^12;
q := (x*y - x + y + 1)/(x*y + x + y + 1);
t := (-x*y + x - y - 1)/(x*y + x - y - 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
